synopsis: Join Jedi Master Kelleran Beq (Ahmed Best), wise-cracking protocol droid AD-3 (Mary Holland), and astromech LX-R5 in Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge, as they guide Padawans Sean and Hailey (Blue Team), Evan and Tobin (Orange Team), and Dodge and Tate (Purple Team) in their quest to become Jedi Knights!
title: Episode 3
